project_type: Python HF trading system (NeuroX v9) with MQL5 EA
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'python backtest.py' with no args to confirm it shows a usage message gracefully. 2. Run 'python -m pytest tests/' to confirm existing tests still pass (5 tick_collector tests fail pre-existing, not related).
setup_instructions: pip install numpy pandas (already installed in environment)
environment_constraints: numpy 2.5.0 and pandas 3.0.3 pre-installed. No Docker needed. No external network needed - pure Python implementation.
contribution_requirements: Commit to neurox-v9-release branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: Config class in config.py holds all constants. momentum.py has compute_momentum(), compute_atr(), detect_regime(), compute_mean_reversion_signal(). Trailing stop tiers from EA: BE=$0.30 (SL=entry+spread+buffer), T2=$0.60 profit/dist $0.40, T3=$1.20/dist $0.25, T4=$2.00/dist $0.15. Fixed SL=$2.00. Lot=0.01. XAUUSD: 0.01 lot = $0.01/point = $1 per $1 move.
directory_structure: Root: main.py (trading loop), config.py (constants), momentum.py (signal logic), tick_collector.py (tick aggregation), trailing_stop.py (Python trailing stop manager), bridge.py (signal bridge to EA). Include/ has MQL5 header files. tests/ has pytest tests. New files to create: backtest.py (root), data/README.md.
